landing.introduction: With a range of built-in and extensible Modes, Tumble Code lets you plan, architect, code, debug and boost your productivity like never before. Pick an LLM provider below to get started.

telemetry.helpImproveMessage: Tumble Code collects error and usage data to help us fix bugs and improve the extension. This telemetry does not collect code, prompts or personal information. You can turn this off in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>.
